reasoning: Without a known URL to fetch Polymarket data and without web search capabilities, I am evaluating this purely on base rates. The LMSYS Chatbot Arena Leaderboard historically features a fierce three-way competition between OpenAI, Anthropic, and Google. OpenAI tends to be the favorite due to their historical track record of leading the SOTA, releasing models like GPT-4o or upcoming iterations (e.g., Orion/GPT-5). Anthropic has also shown the ability to claim the #1 spot with models like Claude 3.5 Sonnet. Google has vast resources and has briefly held top spots with Gemini experimental models, making them a strong contender. Assigning equal probabilities among the Big 3 would give Google ~33%, but accounting for the historical dominance of OpenAI and rising capabilities from competitors like Meta and xAI, Google's realistic chance of holding the exact #1 spot on the final day of the year sits slightly lower. I estimate Google has around a 25% chance of being at the very top on December 31.
